title: MCAR lang profession fix
description: Simple fix for MCA Reborn that adds translations to modded professions!
body:
![lMCA Reborn logo with lang profession fix subtext](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/8lcnsHBz/images/7c7d760bab3470e2f077f2849c24c2108c461baf.png)

# What does it do? This simple pack fixes a problem with modded professions and [MCA Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn 'Title') so the job of the villager is properly displayed ## Supported mods This pack for now translates [Villagers Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/villagersplus 'Title') and [Better Archeology](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-archeology 'Title') ### Suggest Want to suggest a mod to add? Come join my [discord](https://discord.gg/5uGJCVMBsk 'Title') and i'll be sure to add it! Also check out the official [MCA Reborn discord](https://discord.gg/EjYwZUJbpf 'Title')!
